claude.description: Best for deep multi-file refactoring, large codebase analysis, thorough code review, and complex architectural changes. 200K context window handles entire applications. More expensive but produces more thorough, deterministic output.

codex.description: Best for quick targeted fixes, terminal/DevOps workflows, prototyping, and autonomous patch-and-PR workflows. Dramatically cheaper (~10x). Stronger on novel engineering challenges (SWE-Bench Pro) and computer-use automation.
